test_cases.description: Triggers when generating a React component in a project with Storybook
test_cases.input: Generate a Card component for our design system
test_cases.expected_behavior: Should check Storybook MCP for existing Card components before generating

test_cases.input: Audit our component library for unused or outdated components
test_cases.expected_behavior: Should use list-all-documentation to get full component inventory

test_cases.description: Triggers when verifying component after generation
test_cases.input: Verify the Modal component passes all tests

test_cases.description: Triggers when user asks to see component
test_cases.input: Show me what the Button component looks like
test_cases.expected_behavior: Should use preview-stories to embed live preview

test_cases.description: Should NOT trigger for projects without Storybook
test_cases.expected_behavior: Should fall back to filesystem-based discovery when Storybook MCP unavailable

test_cases.description: Should NOT trigger for backend-only tasks
test_cases.input: Create a REST API endpoint for user authentication
test_cases.expected_behavior: Should not attempt Storybook MCP tools for backend tasks

test_cases.description: Component discovery must happen before generation
test_cases.input: I need a data table component with sorting and filtering
test_cases.expected_behavior: Should call list-all-documentation then get-documentation before writing new component code

test_cases.input: The Modal component I just generated fails a11y tests
test_cases.expected_behavior: Should read violations from run-story-tests, fix the issues, and re-run tests (max 3 retries)
